name: python3-matplotlib
title: python3-matplotlib
summary: Python based plotting system in a style similar to Matlab
description:
Python based plotting system in a style similar to Matlab
Matplotlib is a pure Python plotting library designed to bring
publication quality plotting to Python with a syntax familiar to
Matlab users. All of the plotting commands in the pylab interface can
be accessed either via a functional interface familiar to Matlab
users or an object oriented interface familiar to Python users.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-matplotlib because Python based plotting system in a style similar to Matlab.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-matplotlib as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-matplotlib with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-matplotlib --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
